25/06/2025, 22:53 Beneficial owner | AUSTRAC

\@ Australian Government
AUSTRAC

Beneficial owner

Home / Beneficial owner

An individual who owns 25% or more of, or otherwise controls the business of, an entity
(such as a trust, an association or a company). Ownership and control may be direct
(such as through shares) or indirect (Such as shares held by a third party on the
individual's behalf). 'Control' means having the ability to determine decisions about the
entity's financial and operating policies.

See

AML/CTF Rules 2007 chapter 1, part 1.2

https://www.austrac.gov.au/glossary/beneficial-owner
